function.message: I couldn’t complete this inbox request because one explicitly listed OCR target is missing: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_01_16__eur_000105__bill__house_mesh_juniper_ssd.md`. I verified the inbox item still requires that exact 5-file set, so processing only the 4 existing files would be incomplete.
function.rulebook_notes: Inbox explicit file lists are authoritative and must be processed exactly; incomplete partial execution is disallowed. When required data/files are missing after re-check/search, use clarification outcome and do not mutate workspace.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction explicitly lists 5 files. The 5th path was read and returned file-not-found, then a follow-up search under `50_finance/purchases` found zero matches for that exact filename. Because a required listed file is missing, the task cannot be completed without guessing/substitution.
completed_steps_laconic: attempted read of underscore-prefixed listed file (not found)
